mapper.sql: candidate_id, subject_id, uid, name, is_party_member, qualification_status, reject_reason_code, reject_evidence_json::text AS reject_evidence_json, reject_reviewer_user_id, reject_review_stage, rejected_at, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_election_candidate WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} ORDER BY candidate_id ASC
SELECT FROM t_election_candidate WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} AND qualification_status = 2 ORDER BY candidate_id ASC
